display.purpose: Page titles in topbars and reader article headings.

headline.purpose: Card section titles and modal headings.

title.purpose: Sidebar names and emphasized list labels.

body.purpose: Default UI copy, forms, and table cells at 14px.

label.purpose: Uppercase mono table headers and meta stamps.

mono.purpose: Slugs, code snippets, and numeric data.

shadows.name: modal-scrim
shadows.purpose: Modal overlay background with optional 4px backdrop blur.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default 150ms transitions on buttons, borders, and backgrounds.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Reader nav chevron and outline interactions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action: save, create, add selected.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(55% 0.16 25); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; background: oklch(55% 0.16 25); color: oklch(100% 0 0); transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(55% 0.16 25) 88%, black); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(55% 0.16 25); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions: cancel, close, alternate paths.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.006 250); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: oklch(20% 0.02 250); transition: border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(20% 0.02 250); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(55% 0.16 25); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: oklch(55% 0.015 250); transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: oklch(20% 0.02 250); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(20% 0.02 250) 6%, transparent); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(55% 0.16 25); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text field for forms, search, and modals.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.006 250); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(98% 0.004 250); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Inter", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(20% 0.02 250); transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(55% 0.16 25); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(55% 0.16 25) 12%, transparent); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(55% 0.015 250); }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Published / draft status tags in page lists.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: lowercase; } .ds-pill-green { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(65% 0.15 145) 15%, transparent); color: oklch(45% 0.13 145); } .ds-pill-blue { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(60% 0.16 255) 12%, transparent); color: oklch(55% 0.14 255); }

components.name: Section Card
components.description: Grouped settings and editor sections on site/doc pages.
components.html:
Details

Site name, slug, and status.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(100% 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.006 250); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(20% 0.02 250); } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(55% 0.015 250); }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: Scan-first list rows in docs, releases, and feedback tables.
components.html:
TitleStatus
API Referencedraft
Getting Startedpublished
components.css: .ds-table-demo { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 14px; background: oklch(100% 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.006 250); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-table-demo th { padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; color: oklch(55% 0.015 250); font-family: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.006 250); } .ds-table-demo td { padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.006 250); } .ds-row:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(20% 0.02 250) 6%, transparent); } .ds-row.is-selected { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(55% 0.16 25) 12%, transparent); } .ds-strong { font-weight: 600; color: oklch(20% 0.02 250); } .ds-muted { color: oklch(55% 0.015 250); font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Doc reader sidebar page link with active state.
components.html: View History OrderUser Log Activity
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-link { display: block; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(55% 0.015 250) 90%, oklch(20% 0.02 250)); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(20% 0.02 250); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(20% 0.02 250) 6%, transparent); } .ds-nav-link.is-active { color: oklch(55% 0.16 25); font-weight: 500; background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(55% 0.16 25) 8%, transparent); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(55% 0.16 25); outline-offset: 0; }

narrative.overview: Orbit Docs is built for software teams in focused work sessions: editing docs, reviewing versions, publishing releases. The interface should disappear into the task. Surfaces are calm, cool, and lightly tinted; a single warm accent marks primary actions and current selection. Density is practical (tables, sidebars, forms) without clutter. This system rejects marketing spectacle.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained palette: cool neutrals + warm coral accent used sparingly
System sans (Inter / native stack) with mono for labels, slugs, and data
Flat surfaces at rest; depth via borders, tonal fills, and focus rings
Dark mode via .dark class on the same OKLCH token family

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The warm coral accent appears on primary actions, selection, and focus only. It must not wallpaper backgrounds, headings, or decorative chrome. If more than ~10% of a viewport reads as accent, pull back.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Never use pure #000 or #fff. Neutrals carry a slight cool hue (chroma ~0.004–0.02, hue ~250).

rules.name: The Mono-For-Data Rule
rules.body: Slugs, timestamps, version numbers, and table headers use --font-mono with tabular nums. Body copy stays in the sans stack.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards and panels do not cast shadows at rest. Elevation appears only for modals, floating FABs, and explicit overlay layers.

dos: Do use semantic tokens (--bg, --surface, --fg, --accent) so light and dark modes stay aligned.
Do keep primary actions as .btn-primary with the warm accent; secondary paths as ghost or secondary.
Do use borders and tonal hovers before reaching for shadows.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for app transitions.
Do cap reader prose at comfortable line lengths and let markdown content dominate the viewport.
donts: Don't use marketing-heavy landing patterns with hero metrics and gradient text.
Don't build cluttered dashboards with nested cards and excessive chrome.
Don't default to generic SaaS cream-and-blue aesthetics or AI slop template layouts.
Don't over-animate interfaces; motion must convey state, not decoration.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient headings.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop blur except on modal overlays.
Don't nest cards inside cards; use spacing and dividers for inner hierarchy.
